query:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

final_prompt.prompt:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

Create a photorealistic editorial screenshot of a Douyin (TikTok China) live stream featuring the actress known as 神仙姐姐 (Liu Yifei), holding a handwritten sign during the broadcast.

Style/medium: photorealistic mobile screenshot, simulating a real Douyin live stream UI with on-screen overlays, viewer comments scrolling, and live badge
Composition: vertical 9:16 portrait framing, subject centered in frame, slight medium close-up showing face and upper body including the sign she holds
Subject: 神仙姐姐 — a graceful young Chinese woman with delicate features, long dark hair, natural makeup, warm smile, holding a rectangular sign with both hands at chest level
Scene/backdrop: softly lit indoor live-stream setup, blurred background suggesting a cozy home or studio environment
Lighting/mood: soft, flattering ring-light or diffused LED panel from the front, warm and inviting tone
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, soft neutral background, Douyin UI elements in white and red accent
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" written clearly on the sign she holds; Douyin live stream UI overlay text including "直播中" badge
Constraints: sign text must be fully legible and centered on the placard; Douyin-style UI chrome (comment bar, like animations, follower count) must be visible as screen overlay
Avoid: blurry or illegible text on sign, distorted hands or fingers, generic streamer setup without Douyin UI, over-saturated skin tones

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为"神仙姐姐"抖音直播生成一张 9:16 竖版直播截图，模拟真实抖音 App 直播界面风格。

风格/介质:手机截图风格，模拟抖音 App 直播界面，带有直播 UI 元素叠加（弹幕、点赞、礼物、关注按钮、直播间人数等），photorealistic 人物质感
构图:9:16 竖构图，人物居中偏下，上方留出直播间标题栏与弹幕区域，下方留出互动按钮栏，镜头正面平视
主体:神仙姐姐（刘亦菲）形象，长发飘逸，妆容精致自然，双手捧举一块白色手写牌子，牌子朝向镜头，表情亲切微笑
场景/背景:室内直播间背景，柔和灯光，背景略虚化，营造温馨直播氛围
光线/氛围:正面柔光补光灯，色温偏暖，皮肤通透，整体氛围亲切、活泼
色彩搭配:抖音界面黑色顶栏与红色点赞图标作为 UI 点缀，人物区域以暖肤色与柔白背景为主
文字(原文保留):"今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"（写在人物手持的牌子上，黑色手写体，清晰可读）
约束:牌子上文字必须完整呈现"今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"；界面需有抖音直播 UI 元素（弹幕条、点赞动画、直播间人数角标）以增强截图真实感
避免:文字模糊或错字、人物五官变形、背景过于杂乱、UI 元素遮挡人物面部

final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: vertical screenshot mockup, 9:16 phone screen, TikTok / Douyin live stream interface
Primary request: a realistic Douyin (TikTok) live-stream screenshot featuring a young beautiful Chinese actress resembling "神仙姐姐" (Liu Yifei-type appearance) holding a handwritten sign during her live broadcast
Scene/backdrop: indoor live-stream setup, soft studio lighting, blurred background with ring light glow
Subject: elegant young Chinese woman with delicate features, long black hair, bright eyes, warm smile, holding a sign with both hands facing the camera
Style/medium: photorealistic screenshot, mobile UI overlay, candid live-stream capture
Composition/framing: portrait vertical 9:16, medium close-up, front-facing, slight eye contact with camera
Lighting/mood: soft warm ring-light illumination, intimate and welcoming live-stream atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, soft pink/white background glow, Douyin red/black UI accents
Materials/textures: realistic skin texture, natural hair strands, cardboard or white paper sign held in hands
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" written clearly on the sign in black marker; Douyin live-stream UI overlay including viewer count, comment feed, red heart animations, and top bar with 直播 label
Constraints: sign text must be fully legible and centered on the sign; UI elements must resemble authentic Douyin live interface; subject must be the clear focal point
Avoid: blurry or distorted Chinese characters on the sign, deformed hands, unrealistic skin, generic stock-photo look, watermark
